title: 1 week until a breathtaking blood moon rises over the US during total lunar eclipse 2026
description: The total lunar eclipse occurs around the March full moon phase, as the sun, Earth and lunar disk align.
content: The total lunar eclipse occurs around the March full moon phase, as the sun, Earth and lunar disk align.
